info.title: Peer-to-Peer Boliviano (BOB) Exchange Data
info.subtitle: Github Actions ETL Pipeline
info.description: This project contains the ETL pipeline for the Peer-to-Peer Boliviano (BOB) Exchange Data. The data is collected from various sources and transformed into a clean format for analysis. The pipeline includes data extraction, transformation, and loading processes, along with data quality checks. [Dataset de Kaggle](https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/andreschirinos/p2p-bob-exchange) [Almacenamiento RAW](https://drive.google.com/drive/u/0/folders/1q9XHo4nUIawftnjeLVfSBbEM5r9q3qjn) [Dashboard Interactivo](https://p2p-bob-exchange.streamlit.app/) [Repositorio de Github](https://github.com/andres-chirinos/p2p-bob-exchange)
